settings.content: A floating AI chat widget powered by Claude AI. Helps shoppers find products, get sizing help, and check orders.

settings.label: Chat Server URL
settings.info: Your deployed chat-server backend URL (e.g. https://your-app.railway.app).

settings.label: Assistant Name
settings.info: Shown in the header and welcome screen.

settings.label: Tagline
settings.info: Shown below the assistant name on the welcome screen.

settings.label: Welcome Message
settings.default: Hi, I'm Archie — your personal fit and comfort expert. I'll help you find the right shoes, sandals, or orthotics based on your foot type, support needs, and daily lifestyle.
settings.info: Greeting shown when a customer first opens the chat.

settings.label: Disclaimer Text
settings.default: Powered by Aetrex fit technology · Not medical advice
settings.info: Shown at the bottom of the chat panel. Leave blank to hide.

settings.label: Launcher Bar Width (px)
settings.info: Width of the search-bar style launcher.

settings.label: Launcher Placeholder
settings.default: How can Archie help your feet today?
settings.info: Text shown in the search-bar launcher.

settings.label: Input Placeholder
settings.default: How can Archie help your feet today?
settings.info: Placeholder text in the chat input field.

settings.label: Banner Image
settings.info: Hero/cover image at the top of the welcome screen. Recommended: 800x320px.

settings.label: Assistant Avatar
settings.info: Avatar shown in the launcher, header, and welcome screen. Recommended: square, 200x200px.

settings.label: CTA 1 Message
settings.info: Message sent when customer clicks this CTA.

settings.label: CTA 2 Message
settings.info: Message sent when customer clicks this CTA.

settings.label: CTA 3 Message
settings.default: Help me find the right orthotic
settings.info: Message sent when customer clicks CTA 3.

settings.label: CTA 4 Message
settings.default: I have foot pain and need help
settings.info: Message sent when customer clicks CTA 4.

settings.label: CTA Hint Text
settings.info: Shown below quick picks. Leave blank to hide.

settings.content: Small pill-style buttons shown below the CTAs for common topics.

settings.label: Quick Pick 1 Message
settings.default: Show me shoes with the best arch support

settings.label: Quick Pick 2 Message
settings.default: I have flat feet, what do you recommend?

settings.label: Quick Pick 3 Message
settings.default: Show me the best walking shoes

settings.label: Quick Pick 4 Message
settings.default: I have plantar fasciitis, what shoes help?

settings.label: Primary Color
settings.info: Launcher icon, header, send button, user bubbles.

settings.label: CTA Button Background
settings.info: Background color of the welcome screen CTA buttons.

settings.label: CTA Button Text
settings.info: Text color of the welcome screen CTA buttons.

settings.label: CTA Button Hover
settings.info: Background color when hovering over CTA buttons.

settings.label: Shipping Rate
settings.info: Enter shipping cost (e.g., 0 for free shipping, 5.99 for paid). Leave blank to omit from schema.

settings.label: Shipping Destination Country
settings.info: Two-letter country code (e.g., US, CA, GB). Used for shipping and return policy.

settings.label: Return Window (Days)
settings.info: Number of days customers have to return items (e.g., 30). Leave blank for unlimited returns.

settings.label: Return Policy URL
settings.info: Link to your full return policy page.
